message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>OBJECTIVE</jats:title>
                  <jats:p>This study was designed to study affect of COVID 19 pandemic on lifestyle of young adults and adolescent.</jats:p>
                </jats:sec>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>METHOD</jats:title>
                  <jats:p>Online survey, was conducted in about 1000 respondents in the age group of 13–25 years.</jats:p>
                </jats:sec>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>RESULTS</jats:title>
                  <jats:p>Questionnaire based survey showed mean sleeping duration changing from 6.85hours to 8.17hours, average screen time becoming 5.12hours from 3.5hours, 51.9% subjects experiencing increased stress levels, 76.4% subjects experiencing increased food intake and 38.6% subjects had decreased levels of physical activity as per self-monitoring.</jats:p>
                </jats:sec>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>CONCLUSION</jats:title>
                  <jats:p>These changes might have long lasting effect on their physical, mental and social health and need counteractive measures to help young people lead a healthy lifestyle during the epidemic and beyond.</jats:p>
                </jats:sec>
title: IMPACT OF COVID-19 PANDEMIC LED LOCKDOWN ON THE LIFESTYLE OF ADOLESCENTS AND YOUNG ADULTS
